description: I am an experienced fullstack developer. On a daily basis I professionally work with technologies such as Java, Javascript and their frameworks Spring Boot and Angular (2). I have participated in the implementation of many projects, but I have also been responsible for the implementation of several modules on my own, concerning the GUI, creating REST and SOAP API and several REST API integrations. I also have experience in mobile and desktop application development. I have been involved in developing several mobile applications for android and iOS. I have developed native applications for android and iOS platforms as well as cross-platform applications using frameworks such as Flutter, Ionic and JavaFX.
